name: cufant
flavor_texts: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.
If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.
text: Cufant is the Copperderm Pokémon. It is a steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: sheer-force, heavy-metal (hidden). Base stats — HP: 72, Attack: 80, Defense: 49, Sp. Atk: 40, Sp. Def: 49, Speed: 40. Evolution line: cufant → copperajah. Lore: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all. If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.
